titleStmt.title: SII 40.104: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 104. (A.R. No. B. 84 of 1930.) Ramaḍaka, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Hanumān temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1440, Bahudhānya, Vaiśākha, śu. 15. [Monday], corresponding to 1518 A.D., April 25. However the week day was Sunday.

Records the gift of a village Rāmaḍuka in Nāgārjunakoṇḍa-sīma for conducting worship and offerings in the temple of Chennakēśavadēva at Mācherla by Timmari-Nāyaka, son of Tippa-Nāyaka. The chief is said to have got the Nāgarjunakoṇḍa-sīma as nāyaṁkara from the king, and grant was made on the banks of the Krishṇavēṇi during a lunar eclipse in the presence of god Viśvanāthadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana
śakavarurṣagaḷu 1440 yū bahudhānya saṁvatsara
vaiśākha śu 15 sōrū śrīmaṁnmahārājādhirāja rā
ja vīramahēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra kṛṣṇarā
ya mahārāyaṁḍu pṛthivīrājyaṁ śāyaṁgā
nu yallali nāyaṁkkamakkaḷu tiṁmari nāyaṁkkarū
mācarla caṁnakēśvara dēvari vrāsi matavadaniyi
vedsaśvarirō Aṁggaraṁggavaibhavānaku samarpiṁcina bhūdāna dharmma
śāsanapatraṁ kriṣṇarāyamahārāyaru mī nāyaṁkaraka
mīda nāggārjunakoṁḍa sīme yōḷa gaṇā rāmaḍukā ma
grā 1 nū sōmāvārirāga puṇyakālamaṁdū kriṣṇavēṇitīra
haṇavarta viśvanāthadēvara sannidhiyalu sahiraṇyōdaka dhāna
dhārāpūrvakamugā kṛṣṇarāyamahārāyariki pu
ṇyaṁgānu dhāravośi samarpistimi Āgrāmaṁdali catu
śīmā taṭaka dhana nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa Akṣiṇi Āgāmani
siddha sādhyasahita Aṣṭabhōga nijasvāmyananū svāmi mācarla
ceṁnakēśvaradēvara Amṛtapaḷla saṁbatta Aṁggaraṁgavayibhavagaḷaku
gānu mārikoṁḍḍu ĀcaṁdrārkasthāIgānu svāmi mācarla
ceṁnakēśvaradēvaru Avadariṁci naivēdyaṁ Aṁga raṁga vaibhavagaḷu
naḍabahavāge vākiṭama tippanāyaṁkaru makaḷu tiṁ
mari nāyaṁkarū trivācakavāgi Anubhaviṁcedi .
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpa
hārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavet . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dā
nāchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānāsvargamavāpnōti pālanāda
cyutaṁ padaṁ . Āhā rāghavarājaṁ prasastakalpopajivvahaṁ .
na śṛṇominavasyāmi svayaṁ dattāpahāriṇōṁ . mīgrā
maṁ yavvarāyanemimācarla caṁnakēśvaru dēvaraku naḍacirāniki
tappi puccukonivāru govuṁnnubrahminini caṁppina pāpā
naṁ bōduru tama komāruni kapālāna kāṭikevaḍḍina pā
pānaṁ bōvuvāru . tiṁmappanāyaniṁgāri Ānati kra
māna devaru supradda vrāIṁccina dharmaśāsanamu . śrī śrī
Ī rāmaḍuka grāmaṁ ceṁnakēśavarāyani Iyyaka yavva
ru tappi puccukoṁnānu vāninū tigāraṭaḍi baḍḍu
marinivānikūriki pādarakṣa . tiṁmappa baradū .
Digital edition of SII 40.104 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
